_readme: Representative remote SSH project configurations for Claude Code UI.
JSON has no comments, so this file documents the fields in '_fields' and
shows one example per authentication mode under 'examples'. You do NOT edit
this file to create a project — create remote projects through the UI
(New Project -> Add Remote Project). These values map to the fields that the
wizard sends to POST /api/remote-projects and to the projects table columns
See docs/remote-ssh-projects.md for the full guide.

_fields.customProjectName: Optional display name shown in the sidebar.
_fields.remote_host: Hostname or IP of the remote host.
_fields.remote_user: SSH username to log in as.
_fields.remote_path: Absolute path to the project folder on the remote host. All remote file/terminal/chat operations stay under this path.
_fields.remote_auth_type: 'key' (paste a private key), 'password' (paste a password), or 'agent' (use the server's SSH agent / default ~/.ssh key; no stored credential).
_fields.credential: Only for 'key' or 'password' modes: the private key text or the password. Stored encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM). NEVER returned to the client. Omitted entirely for 'agent' mode.

private_key.credential:
-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
...paste the private key here...
-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
